variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16703 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16703 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16703 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 555.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 506.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 477.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 226.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 205.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P635236 Air Filter, Primary Round Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16703
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P635236 Air Filter, Primary Round Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16703
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson PowerCore® filters? Genuine PowerCore filters provide superior protection and performance. • Lower initial restriction protects engine performance and fuel economy. • Greater filter capacity means longer filter life, fewer filter changes and less money spent on maintenance. • PowerCore filters have been meeting original equipment manufacturer specifications for 20+ years. • Reliable, leak resistant Radial Seal™ technology keeps the filter in place – even under heavy vibration.
